projects.title: Lab 1: Hello World & Setup
projects.description: Set up Azure hosting and GitHub. Deployed a Hello World page and explored web server basics.

projects.title: Lab 2: HTML Resume
projects.description: Built a structured HTML resume using semantic tags, lists, and CSS styling with flexbox layout.

projects.title: Lab 3: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Designed a multi-page portfolio site with a navbar, projects page, and custom CSS gradients.

projects.title: Lab 5: JavaScript Basics
projects.description: Introduction to JavaScript with interactive DOM manipulation, event listeners, and dynamic content.

projects.title: Lab 6: jQuery
projects.description: jQuery event handling, animations, and dynamic list manipulation using the jQuery library.

projects.title: Lab 8: JSON & AJAX
projects.description: Used fetch() to load a JSON file and dynamically built this projects page without hardcoded HTML.

projects.title: Lab 9: PHP & MySQL
projects.description: Built a server-side app with PHP forms and a MySQL database to store and display data.

projects.title: Lab 10: Production Deployment
projects.description: Deployed the full site to a live server with HTTPS, password protection, and auto-deploy from GitHub.
